name: Devika
description: Open-source agentic software engineer that plans multi-step tasks, browses the web for context, and writes coordinated multi-file code from high-level instructions.

skills.name: Multi-Step Task Planning
skills.description: Decompose a high-level objective into ordered research and coding subtasks using the agent planning and reasoning pipeline.

skills.name: Autonomous Web Research
skills.description: Browse the web to gather documentation, examples, and context needed to complete the assigned coding objective.

skills.name: Multi-File Code Generation
skills.description: Write and coordinate code across multiple files to produce a complete working implementation of the planned objective.
